summary: Mixed‑feel show with praised Gloria and Morning Dew, but no clear recording details
review: Reviewers note a good‑time vibe and single out Gloria (mentioned twice) and Morning Dew as highlights, though one reviewer gave the set zero stars. No comments address the soundboard quality, leaving the technical side ambiguous.

ai_rating.rationale: Stars range from 5 to 0 with limited detail; musical highlights are modest while recording quality is unknown, yielding an average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewers commented on clarity, mix, or source; cannot assess technical fidelity.
